  • Keep Parking Free in Daventry - Sign the Petition!

Keep Parking Free in Daventry - Sign the Petition!

  • Tweet

Daventry’s car parks have always been free, helping families, visitors, and local businesses. 

Proposed charges could make it harder for people to access the town and put extra pressure on traders and residents. Free parking supports our town centre and keeps Daventry accessible for everyone. 

If you agree, please add your name to this petition to show your support.

The proposed carparks affected:

Brook Street, Chapel Lane, Chaucer Way, Eastern Way, Golding Close, High Street, Lodge Road, Lodge Road Upper, Old Gas Works, Primrose Hill, St James Square, St Johns Square, The Doubles, The Hollow, Welton Road Undercroft.

 

Keep parking free in Daventry

  • Current Your details
  • Proposed parking charges in Daventry.
I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me:
There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy.

Stuart Andrew MP Member of Parliament for the Daventry Constituency
